languages.text: "Не могу найти... Сердце! За-забыл его там... в трубе... Нужно проверить!" {n}Юноша озирается и бормочет бессмыслицу, время от времени ударяя по палубе и прислушиваясь. Внезапно он устремляет взгляд на ладони.{/n} "Тело подменили... Это руки тунеядца, не мои!"

"I can't find... my heart! I for-forgot it down there in the shaft... I need to check!" {n}The young man glances around, mumbling nonsensically and occasionally slamming his fist on the deck and pausing to listen. His attention suddenly shifts to his hands.{/n} "My body's been switched... These are the hands of an idler, not mine!"
languages.original_text: "Не могу найти... Сердце! За-забыл его там... в трубе... Нужно проверить!" {n}Юноша озирается и бормочет бессмыслицу, время от времени ударяя по палубе и прислушиваясь. Внезапно он устремляет взгляд на ладони.{/n} "Тело подменили... Это руки тунеядца, не мои!"

traits.locale_text: "I can't find... my heart! I for-forgot it down there in the shaft... I need to check!" {n}The young man glances around, mumbling nonsensically and occasionally slamming his fist on the deck and pausing to listen. Then he stares at his own hands.{/n} "My body's been switched... These are the hands of an idler, not mine!"

"I can't find... my heart! I for-forgot it down there in the shaft... His attention suddenly shifts to his hands.{/n} "My body's been switched... These are the hands of an idler, not mine!"

"I can't find... my heart! I for-forgot it down there in the shaft... I need to check!" {n}The young man glances around, mumbling nonsensically and occasionally slamming his fist on the deck and pausing to listen. Then he stares at his own hands.{/n} "My body's been switched... These are the hands of an idler, not mine!"

"I can't find... my heart! I for-forgot it down there in the shaft... I need to check!" {n}The young man glances around, mumbling nonsensically and occasionally slamming his fist on the deck and pausing to listen. His attention suddenly shifts to his hands.{/n} "My body's been switched... These are the hands of an idler, not mine!"

languages.text: 「心臓が見当たらない！シャフトの下に忘れてしまったのかもしれない…。確認しなくては！もし自分が交代勤務でなかったらどうしよう…。自分の体と入れ替わってしまったのかもしれない…。これは怠け者の手だ、私の手ではない！」
languages.original_text: "I can't find my heart! I guess I forgot it down there in the shaft.... I need to check! What if I'm not the one on shift? I think my body's been switched... These are the hands of an idler, not mine!"

traits.locale_text: 「心臓が見当たらない！シャフトの下に忘れてしまったのかもしれない…。確認しなくては！もし自分が交代勤務でなかったらどうしよう…。自分の体と入れ替わってしまったのかもしれない…。これは怠け者の手だ、私の手ではない！」

languages.text: “我找不到……我的心脏了！我把它……把它落在竖井里了……我得去找找！”{n}年轻人四处张望，嘴里胡言乱语，时不时一拳砸在甲板上，然后停下来倾听着什么。接着他盯着自己的双手说：{/n}“我的身体被掉包了……这是懒汉的手，不是我的！”
languages.original_text: "I can't find... my heart! I for-forgot it down there in the shaft... I need to check!" {n}The young man glances around, mumbling nonsensically and occasionally slamming his fist on the deck and pausing to listen. Then he stares at his own hands.{/n} "My body's been switched... These are the hands of an idler, not mine!"

traits.locale_text: “我找不到……我的心脏了！我把它……把它落在竖井里了……我得去找找！”{n}年轻人四处张望，嘴里胡言乱语，时不时一拳砸在甲板上，然后停下来倾听着什么。接着他盯着自己的双手说：{/n}“我的身体被掉包了……这是懒汉的手，不是我的！”

languages.text: « Je ne trouve pas... mon cœur ! Je l'ai oublié dans le conduit... Je dois aller voir ! » {n}Le jeune homme lance un regard à la ronde, marmonnant des propos incohérents, frappant le pont de son poing de temps à autre, ou s'arrêtant pour écouter. Puis, il regarde ses propres mains.{/n} « Je me suis retrouvé dans un autre corps... Je n'ai pas des mains de fainéant ! »
languages.original_text: "I can't find... my heart! I for-forgot it down there in the shaft... I need to check!" {n}The young man glances around, mumbling nonsensically and occasionally slamming his fist on the deck and pausing to listen. Then he stares at his own hands.{/n} "My body's been switched... These are the hands of an idler, not mine!"

traits.locale_text: « Je ne trouve pas... mon cœur ! Je l'ai oublié dans le conduit... Je dois aller voir ! » {n}Le jeune homme lance un regard à la ronde, marmonnant des propos incohérents, frappant le pont de son poing de temps à autre, ou s'arrêtant pour écouter. Puis, il regarde ses propres mains.{/n} « Je me suis retrouvé dans un autre corps... Je n'ai pas des mains de fainéant ! »

languages.text: «¡No encuentro mi corazón! Supongo que me lo olvidé allí, en el conducto...». {n}El joven mira a su alrededor, murmurando disparates varios y aporreando ocasionalmente la cubierta, haciendo una pausa para escuchar. Después, se mira las manos.{/n} «Creo que me han cambiado el cuerpo... ¡Estas son las manos de un vago, no las mías!».
languages.original_text: "I can't find... my heart! I for-forgot it down there in the shaft... I need to check!" {n}The young man glances around, mumbling nonsensically and occasionally slamming his fist on the deck and pausing to listen. Then he stares at his own hands.{/n} "My body's been switched... These are the hands of an idler, not mine!"

traits.locale_text: «¡No encuentro mi corazón! Supongo que me lo olvidé allí, en el conducto...». {n}El joven mira a su alrededor, murmurando disparates varios y aporreando ocasionalmente la cubierta, haciendo una pausa para escuchar. Después, se mira las manos.{/n} «Creo que me han cambiado el cuerpo... ¡Estas son las manos de un vago, no las mías!».

languages.text: "Kalbimi bulamıyorum! Onu aşağıda, şaftta unuttum... Gidip bakmalıyım!" {n}Genç adam etrafına bakınıyor, anlamsızca mırıldanıyor ve ara sıra yumruğunu güverteye vurup dinlemek için duraklıyor. Ardından kendi ellerine dik dik bakıyor.{/n} "Bedenim değiştirilmiş... Bunlar bir tembelin elleri, benim değil!"
languages.original_text: "I can't find... my heart! I for-forgot it down there in the shaft... I need to check!" {n}The young man glances around, mumbling nonsensically and occasionally slamming his fist on the deck and pausing to listen. Then he stares at his own hands.{/n} "My body's been switched... These are the hands of an idler, not mine!"

traits.locale_text: "Kalbimi bulamıyorum! Onu aşağıda, şaftta unuttum... Gidip bakmalıyım!" {n}Genç adam etrafına bakınıyor, anlamsızca mırıldanıyor ve ara sıra yumruğunu güverteye vurup dinlemek için duraklıyor. Ardından kendi ellerine dik dik bakıyor.{/n} "Bedenim değiştirilmiş... Bunlar bir tembelin elleri, benim değil!"

languages.text: "Ich finde mein ... Herz nicht! Ich h-hab es unten im Schacht vergessen ... Ich muss es suchen!" {n}Der junge Mann sieht sich um, murmelt einige unverständliche Worte und schlägt gelegentlich mit seiner Faust auf das Deck. Dann starrt er auf seine Hände.{/n} "Mein Körper wurde ausgetauscht ... Das sind die Hände eines Faulenzers, nicht meine!"
languages.original_text: "I can't find... my heart! I for-forgot it down there in the shaft... I need to check!" {n}The young man glances around, mumbling nonsensically and occasionally slamming his fist on the deck and pausing to listen. Then he stares at his own hands.{/n} "My body's been switched... These are the hands of an idler, not mine!"
